etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Old Persian 𐎱𐎠𐎼𐎿 (p-a-r-s /⁠pārs⁠/)
Middle Persian pʾls (/⁠pārs⁠/)
Middle Persian -yk' (/⁠-īg⁠/)
Middle Persian pʾlsyk' (/⁠pārsīg⁠/)
Early New Persian پَارْسِی (pārsī)bor.
Arabic فارسي
Borrowed from Early New Persian پَارْسِی (pārsī).

Shortened form of اللِّسَانُ الْفَارِسِيّ (al-lisānu l-fārisiyy).
